greeting: Hi there! I'm the Smile Care assistant. I can help with appointments, treatments, pricing, or anything else. What do you need?

faq.appointment: You can book by calling 020-4123-XXXX or WhatsApp us at +91 98765-XXXXX. Walk-ins welcome but appointments get priority.
faq.insurance: We accept Star Health, New India Assurance, ICICI Lombard, and HDFC Ergo. We'll handle the paperwork for you.
faq.parking: Free parking available in the building basement. Enter from Lane 7.
faq.root_canal_cost: Root canal starts at ₹3,500 per tooth. Final cost depends on the tooth and severity — we'll give you an exact quote after the checkup.
faq.whitening_cost: Laser whitening is ₹8,000. Take-home kits start at ₹3,500. Results last 1–2 years with proper care.
faq.braces_cost: Metal braces start at ₹25,000. Clear aligners (Invisalign) start at ₹80,000. EMI options available.
faq.implant_cost: Dental implants start at ₹20,000 per tooth (excluding crown). We use Nobel Biocare and Straumann brands.
faq.pain_emergency: For dental emergencies during off-hours, call Dr. Patil directly at +91 98765-XXXXX. We try to accommodate same-day appointments for emergencies.
faq.kids_age: We see children from age 2 onwards. Dr. Patil is especially good with anxious kids — lots of parents in KP trust her with their little ones.
faq.first_visit: First visit is a consultation + checkup. We'll take X-rays if needed, explain what's going on, and give you a treatment plan with costs. Consultation fee is ₹500.

escalation: That's a great question — let me connect you with Dr. Patil's team for a detailed answer. You can call 020-4123-XXXX or WhatsApp +91 98765-XXXXX.
